title: Wema Bank Probes Unapproved Transactions, Reveals N888.3 Million Customer Fund Loss Due to Technical Glitch - FinancialEDGE
description: In a bid to salvage the sum of N888,301,598.15 alleged to have been taken illegally from the covers of WEMA BANK PLC,the bank has dragged twenty- six financial institutions as defendants before a Federal high court in Lagos urging the court to issue a preservative order urging the banks to salvage the unauthorized withdrawal funds.
